items.title: Tehran will never cede control of Strait of Hormuz, senior Iranian politician tells BBC
items.summary: Lyse Doucet speaks to Ebrahim Azizi, who says Iran "will decide the right of passage" through the crucial shipping route.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Middle East crisis live: Iran reportedly rejects US peace talks; Trump says marines took custody of an Iranian-flagged vessel
items.summary: President says US navy ship fired on vessel that tried to get past the blockade on Iranian ports; Iran has pledged to keep strait of Hormuz closed until blockade is lifted Full...

items.title: Forecast of rain, winds in parts of Maharashtra from April 20
items.summary: After days of high temperature, the Chief Minister’s Office said in a tweet that weather patterns are likely to change in many parts of Maharashtra over the coming days
